Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
George J. Engler, Esq. for Plaintiff: James B. Cone, present, was sworn and examined.

MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick (Dept.611), clerk-beth wilber, reporter-candace yount: Cause called for default prove-up. George Joseph Engler appears for plaintiff, plaintiff James B. Cone also present, no one appears from the CCSF retirement board. Due to some complications in the case, such as an outstanding cross-complaint on an interpleader, and other parties contesting the distribution of funds, the matter is continued to Feb. 24, 2005, 9AM, Dept. 218 to allow Mr. Engler more time to resolve these issues. Notice is waived.
